system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_baogia2_danhsach_print","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_BAOGIA2_DANHSACH_PRINT] (@id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER)
AS
DECLARE @inchToMillimeter   FLOAT
SET @inchToMillimeter = 25.4

SELECT B.hehang,
       B.loaisp,
       B.masp,
       B.masp_khachhang,
       B.tensp,
       b.dai,
       b.rong,
       b.cao,
       dai_inch = b.dai / @inchToMillimeter,
       rong_inch = b.rong / @inchToMillimeter,
       cao_inch = b.cao / @inchToMillimeter,
       dai_carton = SUBSTRING (C.quycach2, 1, CHARINDEX ('*', C.quycach2) - 1),
       rong_carton =
          SUBSTRING
          (
             C.quycach2,
             CHARINDEX ('*', C.quycach2) + 1,
               CHARINDEX ('*', C.quycach2, CHARINDEX ('*', C.quycach2) + 1)
             - CHARINDEX ('*', C.quycach2)
             - 1),
       cao_carton =
          SUBSTRING
          (
             C.quycach2,
             CHARINDEX ('*', C.quycach2, CHARINDEX ('*', C.quycach2) + 1) + 1,
               LEN (C.quycach2)
             - CHARINDEX ('*', C.quycach2, CHARINDEX ('*', C.quycach2) + 1)),
       C.quycach2,
       C.cbm2,
       tong_cuft =
          C.cbm2 * 35.315,
       B.n_weight,
       B.g_weight,
       a.sotien_baogia,
	   b.dongia,
	   b.ketcau,
       B.hinhanh
INTO #TEMP
FROM tr_baogia2_danhsach A
     INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.masp = B.masp
     LEFT JOIN (SELECT *
                FROM tr_sanpham_carton
                WHERE soluong > 0) C
        ON A.masp = C.masp
WHERE A.id = @id

SELECT A.hehang,
       A.loaisp,
       B.tenloaisp,
       B.tenloaisp_English,
       A.masp,
       A.masp_khachhang,
       A.tensp,
       A.dai,
       A.rong,
       A.cao,
       A.dai_inch,
       A.rong_inch,
       A.cao_inch,
       dai_carton =
          CASE
             WHEN ISNUMERIC (A.dai_carton) = 1
             THEN
                CAST (A.dai_carton AS FLOAT)
             ELSE
                0
          END,
       rong_carton =
          CASE
             WHEN ISNUMERIC (A.rong_carton) = 1
             THEN
                CAST (A.rong_carton AS FLOAT)
             ELSE
                0
          END,
       cao_carton =
          CASE
             WHEN ISNUMERIC (A.cao_carton) = 1
             THEN
                CAST (A.cao_carton AS FLOAT)
             ELSE
                0
          END,
       dai_carton_inch =
          IIF
          (ISNUMERIC (A.dai_carton) = 0, 0, A.dai_carton / @inchToMillimeter),
       rong_carton_inch =
          IIF
          (ISNUMERIC (A.rong_carton) = 0,
           0,
           A.rong_carton / @inchToMillimeter),
       cao_carton_inch =
          IIF
          (ISNUMERIC (A.cao_carton) = 0, 0, A.cao_carton / @inchToMillimeter),
       quycach_carton =
          A.quycach2,
       A.cbm2,
       A.tong_cuft,
       A.n_weight,
       A.g_weight,
       n_weight_lbs =
          A.n_weight * 2.2046,
       g_weight_lbs =
          A.g_weight * 2.2046,
       A.sotien_baogia, a.dongia, a.ketcau, a.hinhanh
FROM #TEMP A LEFT JOIN tr_loaisp B ON A.loaisp = B.maloaisp

DROP TABLE #TEMP","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_baogia2_danhsach","dbo.tr_loaisp","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_sanpham_carton"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
